Patch Set 3: Code-Review+2

Sorry to edit your patch (which was itself correct), but I reordered the setup a little bit to match that of sanity.sh since James N. has been working to cleanup/standardize the startup code for the test scripts, and we may as well make this one the same.

commit.subject: LU-14362 tests: sanity-flr to prepare stuff before checks
commit.message:
LU-14362 tests: sanity-flr to prepare stuff before checks

otherwise /mnt/lustre may be missing and sanity-flr fails

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-flr
Change-Id: Ic5502ee07bab557162fbf16718ca5fb5beed45e9
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/41307
